title: Field-Tech Lab 002: Endpoint Health Check
description: Submission template for the existing Field-Tech Lab 002 endpoint health check lab.

required_evidence.label: Endpoint target
required_evidence.description: Identify the endpoint or lab system being checked.

required_evidence.label: Health checks performed
required_evidence.description: List the checks performed, such as network status, disk, memory, services, updates, or logs as applicable.

required_evidence.label: Findings
required_evidence.description: Explain what was healthy, what needs attention, and what evidence supports your conclusion.

required_evidence.label: Validation
required_evidence.description: Show how you verified the endpoint health status or confirmed the task was complete.

required_evidence.label: Professional summary
required_evidence.description: Write a short field-tech or sysadmin-style summary of the endpoint health result.

safety_rules: Do not submit passwords, API keys, SSH private keys, session cookies, or tokens.
Do not run destructive cleanup commands unless the lab explicitly tells you to.
